nodes.label: Comprehensive unit + integration tests for the 8 new MICA P0–P3 modules.  Cove
Yield a new event loop for each async test (compatible with older pytest-asyncio
Run an async coroutine in a fresh event loop (for non-pytest-asyncio envs).
Unit tests for the HypothesisEdge dataclass.
Unit tests for the Hypothesis dataclass.
Unit tests for HypothesisGenerator (no ATOM backend).
Test the internal _compute_fact_confidence with synthetic data.
Unit tests for the static classification methods.
map_protein with no PDB data returns empty landscape.
Build with an unresolvable gene should return empty result.
Verify that modules can coexist and share common patterns.
Every dataclass with to_dict() must return a plain dict.
All dataclasses with created_at should have ISO-format strings.
